title: selaginella schlechteri
intro: Selaginella schlechteri, also known as the "Resurrection Plant," is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae and is native to tropical regions of Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Selaginella schlechteri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Selaginella schlechteri is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are used in various herbal preparations, including creams, ointments, and teas.
